_comment: DiffusionGemma 26B-A4B-it-NVFP4 on an L4 (vLLM) WITH live web search for deep research. Adds vLLM native tool calling via the gemma4 parser: --enable-auto-tool-choice --tool-call-parser gemma4 --reasoning-parser gemma4 (per the official recipe https://recipes.vllm.ai/Google/diffusiongemma-26B-A4B-it — the built-in chat_template handles tools, so NO --chat-template override; thinking STAYS ON, routed to reasoning_content by --reasoning-parser gemma4). openclaw.compat.supportsTools=true is the gate that makes OpenClaw send the tools schema and read native tool_calls. compat.contextWindow + --max-model-len raised so the agent+web prompt fits (web search needs more than the 4096 of the plain config). web/identity reuse the validated T4 wiring (Brave plugin install, USER.md identity). BRAVE_API_KEY forwarded from ~/.env by the launcher. UNVERIFIED on L4 — gemma4 tool calling under block-diffusion decode is not in the official recipe's serve line; run `--gpu L4 --config configs/diffusiongemma_web.json --task examples/web_verify_task.json` and confirm choices[0].message.tool_calls is populated (no tool/reasoning tags leaking into content). FALLBACKS if tool_calls are empty/garbled: (a) add --chat-template <tool_chat_template_gemma4.jinja>, or (b) flip to codeMode (compat.supportsTools=false + web.code_mode=true, drop --tool-call-parser).

vllm.install_command: python -m pip install -U vllm --pre --extra-index-url https://wheels.vllm.ai/nightly/cu129 --extra-index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu129
